summary: Complete Admin Session Management and User Stats Testing - All new features working correctly. Backend 100% (14/14 tests passed), Frontend 100% (all admin features verified via Playwright)
passed_tests: Admin login at /admin with admin/headlock2024 - WORKS
Admin: Navigate to 'Training-Sessions' tab - Shows sessions table with date, coach, confirmed/declined/pending counts, status, actions
Admin: Session table shows existing session 2026-02-21 with Leon Coach and attendance counts
Admin: Click eye icon on session - Opens detailed attendance view with attendees table
Admin: Session detail shows Name, E-Mail, Telefon, Status columns for each attendee
Admin: Session detail shows attendance summary (Zugesagt/Abgesagt/Offen counts)
Admin: Manual attendance status change buttons (confirm/decline/pending) visible and functional
Admin: Create new training session form - Has Trainingsvorlage, Datum, Coach selector, Notes DE/EN, Cancelled toggle
Admin: Edit/Delete session buttons functional
Admin: Navigate to 'Benutzer' tab - Shows Trainer and Schüler tables separately
Admin: Click eye icon on user - Opens user detail view
Admin: User detail shows profile info (name, email, phone, role badge, active status)
Admin: User detail shows Anwesenheitsstatistik (attendance statistics) - Total, Confirmed, Declined, Rate
Admin: User detail shows progress bar for attendance rate (100% shown as full green bar)
Admin: User detail shows Letzte Trainings (recent sessions) table with date, coach, status
Backend: GET /api/admin/sessions returns sessions with attendee details (email, phone)
Backend: POST /api/admin/sessions creates session with auto-attendance for students
Backend: PUT /api/admin/sessions/{id} updates session details
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/sessions/{id} deletes session and related attendance
Backend: PUT /api/admin/attendance/{session_id}/{user_id} updates attendance status
Backend: GET /api/admin/users/{user_id}/stats returns user with stats and recent sessions
Homepage at / loads correctly with hero section
Student dashboard at /student works (login with max@test.de / test1234)
Trainer dashboard at /trainer works (login with leon@test.de / coach1234)
critical_code_review_comments: AdminSessionsManager.jsx correctly implements session CRUD and attendance management
UserDetailView component correctly fetches and displays user stats with recent sessions
Progress bar for attendance rate uses gradient from green to gold (100% width at 100%)
Admin attendance update endpoint correctly accepts pending/confirmed/declined status
All interactive elements have appropriate click handlers
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_admin_sessions_features.py (new - 14 tests for admin session and user stats features)

seed_data.existing_session: 2026-02-21 with Leon Coach as coach, 1 student (Max Mustermann) confirmed

context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin features fully functional: 1) Training-Sessions tab with full CRUD and attendance detail view. 2) User detail view with attendance statistics and recent sessions. 3) Manual attendance status change via admin. Key endpoints: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/sessions, PUT /api/admin/attendance/{sid}/{uid}, GET /api/admin/users/{uid}/stats. All previous features (student/trainer dashboards, homepage) continue working.

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email sending via Resend API is functional but requires RESEND_API_KEY in backend/.env. Without the key, emails are logged but not sent.

admin_sessions_crud.edit_session: PASSED - Updates coach, notes, cancelled status
admin_sessions_crud.delete_session: PASSED - Removes session and attendance records

admin_user_detail.profile_info: PASSED - Name, email, phone, role, active status
admin_user_detail.attendance_stats: PASSED - Total, confirmed, declined, rate percentage
admin_user_detail.progress_bar: PASSED - Visual indicator of attendance rate
admin_user_detail.recent_sessions: PASSED - Table with date, coach, status
